description_long: This object appears to be a distorted and abstract representation of a human figure, with elongated and irregular limbs and body parts. The form is highly fragmented, with angular and stretched features that do not correspond to natural human anatomy. The surface is covered in a camouflage-like pattern with patches of green, brown, and black, giving it a military or outdoor appearance. There are no discernible facial features, hands, or feet, and the overall structure is thin and wiry. The object lacks clear clothing details, accessories, or realistic body proportions. The visual impression is more of a glitched or corrupted digital model than a lifelike pedestrian.
description: A highly distorted, abstract humanoid form with elongated limbs and a camouflage-patterned surface, lacking realistic features or clear clothing.
description_view_0: Angular, stretched limbs and a camouflage-patterned surface are visible, with no clear head or torso.
description_view_1: Shows more of the fragmented structure and thin, wiry appendages, with irregular shapes.
description_view_2: Reveals the most complete view of the elongated limbs and the overall abstract form.
description_view_3: Highlights the irregular, angular body parts and the lack of realistic human features.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract, unidentifiable garment with no clear style or features
attribute_posture: irregular, distorted stance with elongated limbs
